title: FANTIAN 10lbs Mixed Color River Rocks for Garden,20-30 mm Decorative Pebbles for Landscaping Vase. Small Rocks for Potted Succulents, Stones for Planter,Aquarium gGravel and Outdoor Decorative Stones
features: 【Size & Weight】Package: 10 pounds. Size: 20-30 mm.Due to machine screening, some stones will exceed 30 mm in length.They are very clean and have no dust or powder attached

【Pebbles for Plant Pots】FANTIAN colorful pebbles are natural and non-toxic river stones. The round and smooth mixed color pebbles cover succulent plants, potted cactus and outdoor garden beds, which can provide good drainage, help the soil retain moisture, and add beauty to your fairy garden

【Indoor Home Decoration】Add river rocks to your flower show, fix the position of the stems, and make your flower or luck bamboo and the vase more harmoniously connected. D I Y designing wall,glass container, sand box, fireplace, craft project and other home decor is a new experience

【Garden Stones】Since there are no sharp edges, pebbles are easy to step on under your feet. Inlay smooth and round pebbles on the courtyard road. Great for decorating fountain, rock gardens, swimming pools and sidewalks

【Easy to Use】Please wash the surface with hot soapy water for 5 minutes before putting it in the aquarium, and then wash it with clean water. If you have any questions, you can contact us at any time, and we will do our best to solve your problems
description: Product Description FANTIAN - Gardening Makes Life Better Polished Pebbles FANTIAN has become a complete and mature company after 18 years of development. As the source manufacturer of stone, Our products have higher quality and more after-sales service.
